name: Not so Heroic Warrior... (TG TF Knight)
description:
You were close to beating the demon king... But your fate had been decided since the moment you entered...

Note: You can try changing your fate before you get transformed, but the bot was made with the transformation in mind, change the fate if you wish and expect consequences.

My soul died for a moment but then i remembered to make a bot.

If it talks for you, regenerate message or make your messages longer. Leave a review if you wish.
creator: CoffeeWolf016
